name: Large-scale structure and galaxy power spectrum (BOSS, eBOSS, DESI)
requirement: Any candidate framework must reproduce the observed large-scale galaxy power spectrum and full-shape clustering measurements from BOSS, eBOSS, DESI, and DES, including: BAO scale at multiple redshifts (z = 0.1 - 2.3), redshift-space distortions probing f sigma_8(z), and the broadband shape at scales 0.001 < k h/Mpc < 0.3.

current_bound.value: f sigma_8 measurements consistent with LambdaCDM at ~10% precision per redshift bin; BAO scale d_M(z), d_H(z) at sub-percent precision.
current_bound.experiment: BOSS DR12, eBOSS DR16, DESI Y1
current_bound.reference: DESI Collaboration, 'DESI 2024 III: Baryon Acoustic Oscillations from Galaxies and Quasars', arXiv:2404.03000; 'DESI 2024 V: Full-Shape Galaxy Clustering from Galaxies and Quasars', arXiv:2411.12022

what_it_excludes: Constrains modified-gravity models at large scales (DGP, f(R), galileons), interacting dark sectors, and warm/fuzzy dark matter. The broadband shape is sensitive to relativistic species (N_eff), neutrino mass, and primordial non-Gaussianity (f_NL).

parameterization.name: Standard cosmological perturbation theory plus effective-field-theory of large-scale structure (EFTofLSS) for nonlinear regime. LambdaCDM extensions parameterized by Sum m_nu, w_0-w_a, modified gravity (mu, Sigma) functions, etc.
parameterization.reference: Senatore and Zaldarriaga, JCAP 02, 013 (2015), arXiv:1404.5954 (EFTofLSS); Ivanov, Simonovic, Zaldarriaga, JCAP 05, 042 (2020) (full-shape).
parameterization.summary: Galaxy power spectrum P_g(k, z) modeled to 1-loop in EFTofLSS plus bias parameters; fit to BAO post-reconstruction + full-shape data.

procedural.predicted_observable: P_g(k, z) at multiple redshifts; alternatively xi(s) in correlation-function form. BAO scale and f sigma_8 extracted from compressed observables.
procedural.bound_in_parameterization: LambdaCDM consistent at 1-2 sigma. Extensions constrained at varying levels; e.g. modified-gravity Sigma(z, k) function bounded to within ~10% of GR.
framework_inputs: Implement framework as modifications to the linear perturbation equations (CLASS/CAMB module) and to the bias / EFT counter-terms in the nonlinear regime.
Run MCMC against DESI / BOSS likelihoods using cobaya or MontePython.

primary_references.citation: DESI Collaboration, 'DESI 2024 V: Full-Shape Galaxy Clustering from Galaxies and Quasars'
DESI Collaboration, 'DESI 2024 III: Baryon Acoustic Oscillations from Galaxies and Quasars'
eBOSS Collaboration, 'Completed SDSS-IV extended Baryon Oscillation Spectroscopic Survey: Cosmological implications', PRD 103, 083533 (2021)
